page: Microsoft Azure E48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 24 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It includes a bundled local storage capacity of 1843 GB and is Premium Storage capable. The hypervisor layer is managed by Microsoft Hyper-V.

Benchmark results indicate strong CPU and memory subsystem performance. The server achieves top-tier results in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests, alongside a high PassMark CPU score of 51437.1. Cryptographic capabilities are also strong, with a PassMark encryption test score of 51420.58, aided by hardware-accelerated AES, VAES, and SHA_NI instruction sets. Memory performance is robust, scoring in the top 25% on the PassMark memory test, while memory bandwidth tests show average performance, reaching 94.97 GB/sec for large-block read operations.

This configuration is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and large-scale data processing. The combination of 384.0 GB of RAM and 1843 GB of local storage supports large relational databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications. While it lacks dedicated GPU hardware accelerators, its multi-threaded processing capabilities are demonstrated by strong performance in bzip3 multi-threaded decompression and small-model LLM text generation. The server offers a balanced resource density for enterprise workloads requiring high memory capacity relative to compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure E48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance includes 1843 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It delivers strong performance in multi-core processing, cryptography, and memory operations, as evidenced by top-tier stress-ng and PassMark benchmark scores. The server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including relational databases, caching layers, and data processing tasks that benefit from an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio and high-capacity local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 1843 GB local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 CPU for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E48ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 1843 GB local storage on an AMD EPYC 7763 processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, high-capacity local storage, and an eight-to-one memory-to-core ratio.
bullet_points: Powered by a 48-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz
Equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM and 1843 GB of local storage
Strong multi-core CPU and cryptographic benchmark performance
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
Utilizes Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization on x86_64 architecture
